name: Branded Expulsion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>分</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>わ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>かつ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>烙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>印</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Tribute 1 Fusion Monster, then target 2 non-Fusion Monsters that are banished and/or in either GY; Special Summon both monsters, 1 on each field. If you Tributed a Fusion Monster that mentions "Fallen of Albaz" as material to activate this card, you can Special Summon both monsters to your field instead, in Defense Position. You can only activate 1 "Branded Expulsion" per turn.
eff: Tribute 1 Fusion Monster, then target 2 non-Fusion Monsters that are banished and/or in either GY; Special Summon both monsters, 1 on each field. If you Tributed a Fusion Monster that mentions "Fallen of Albaz" as material to activate this card, you can Special Summon both monsters to your field instead, in Defense Position. You can only activate 1 "Branded Expulsion" per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
Special Summons the opponent's banished monsters to the player's field
Special Summons from your Graveyard to your opponent's field
Special Summons from your banishment to the opponent's field
Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's field
Special Summons the opponent's banished monsters to the opponent's field
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
